description_long: This is a white ceramic soup plate set, consisting of a shallow bowl placed atop a larger dinner plate, both with a subtle blue rim. The bowl contains a light-colored creamy soup garnished with a few green herb leaves, likely parsley or cilantro. A white ceramic spoon rests on the right side of the plate, matching the set in color and style. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, reflecting light softly, and the overall design is minimalist and clean. The set appears to be well-suited for serving soup or similar dishes in a formal or casual dining setting. No visible markings, logos, or decorative patterns are present, emphasizing its simple elegance.
description: A white ceramic soup plate set with a matching spoon, featuring a creamy soup and green garnish, all with a minimalist design and blue rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bowl of soup with green garnish, the plate beneath, and the spoon handle extending to the right.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the spoon's full shape and position, with the garnish and soup clearly visible in the bowl.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the spoon's bowl and the layered arrangement of the plate and bowl, with garnish still visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the spoon and the plate's rim, with the garnish in the soup still visible.
